---
title: "RNA-Seq Sleuth Analysis"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
---

```{r setup}
rm(list = ls())

library(sleuth)
library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)

options(mc.cores = parallel::detectCores() - 1)
set.seed(123)
```

# 1. Define directories

```{r}
base_dir <- "/mnt/work-drive/kira/dual-transcriptome/sleuth-all"
setwd(base_dir)

output_dir <- file.path(base_dir, "output")
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
```

# 2. Import data

```{r}
sample_id <- dir(file.path(base_dir, "all"))
kal_dirs <- file.path(base_dir, "all", sample_id)

s2c <- read.csv("meta.csv") %>%
  mutate(path = kal_dirs)

s2c$condition <- factor(s2c$condition,
  levels = c(
    "Control_06", "Exposed_06",
    "Control_24", "Exposed_24",
    "Control_72", "Exposed_72"
  )
)

t2g <- fread("t2g-full.tsv")
t2g.peri <- fread("t2g-peri.tsv")
```


# 3. Build Sleuth objects

```{r full-object}
transformation_fn <- function(x) log2(x + 0.5)

so <- sleuth_prep(
  s2c,
  target_mapping = t2g,
  extra_bootstrap_summary = TRUE,
  read_bootstrap_tpm = TRUE,
  filter_fun = function(x) basic_filter(x, 100, 0.166),
  transformation_function = transformation_fn
)

passed <- so[["filter_df"]][["target_id"]]
saveRDS(so, file.path(output_dir, "so_global.rds"))
```


```{r peri-object}
p.targets <- readLines("p-targets.csv")
peri_passed <- intersect(passed, p.targets)
transformation_fn <- function(x) log2(x + 0.5)

so.peri <- sleuth_prep(
  s2c,
  target_mapping = t2g.peri,
  filter_target_id = peri_passed,
  extra_bootstrap_summary = TRUE,
  read_bootstrap_tpm = TRUE,
  transformation_function = transformation_fn
)
```

# 4. Models and contrasts

```{r fit-models}
so.peri <- sleuth_fit(so.peri, ~1, "reduced")
so.peri <- sleuth_fit(so.peri, ~ 0 + condition, "full")
so.peri <- sleuth_lrt(so.peri, "reduced", "full")
```


```{r base-lrt-results}
peri_results <- sleuth_results(so.peri, "reduced:full", "lrt", show_all = TRUE)

dir.create(file.path(output_dir, "peri"), showWarnings = FALSE)

write_csv(peri_results, file.path(output_dir, "peri/peri_all_results.csv"))
```


```{r wald-timepoint}
# 06h
s2c$condition <- relevel(s2c$condition, ref = "Control_06")
so.peri_06 <- sleuth_prep(s2c, target_mapping = t2g.peri, filter_target_id = peri_passed, 
                          extra_bootstrap_summary = TRUE, read_bootstrap_tpm = TRUE, transformation_function = transformation_fn)
so.peri_06 <- sleuth_fit(so.peri_06, ~condition, "full")
so.peri_06 <- sleuth_wt(so.peri_06, "conditionExposed_06")

# 24h
s2c$condition <- relevel(s2c$condition, ref = "Control_24")
so.peri_24 <- sleuth_prep(s2c, target_mapping = t2g.peri, filter_target_id = peri_passed, 
                          extra_bootstrap_summary = FALSE, read_bootstrap_tpm = TRUE, transformation_function = transformation_fn)
so.peri_24 <- sleuth_fit(so.peri_24, ~condition, "full")
so.peri_24 <- sleuth_wt(so.peri_24, "conditionExposed_24")

# 72h
s2c$condition <- relevel(s2c$condition, ref = "Control_72")
so.peri_72 <- sleuth_prep(s2c, target_mapping = t2g.peri, filter_target_id = peri_passed, 
                          extra_bootstrap_summary = FALSE, read_bootstrap_tpm = TRUE, transformation_function = transformation_fn)
so.peri_72 <- sleuth_fit(so.peri_72, ~condition, "full")
so.peri_72 <- sleuth_wt(so.peri_72, "conditionExposed_72")
```


```{r}
qcut <- 0.05

# 06h results
res_06 <- sleuth_results(so.peri_06, "conditionExposed_06", "wt", show_all = TRUE)
write_csv(res_06,             file.path(output_dir, "peri_wt_06_all.csv"))
write_csv(res_06 %>% filter(qval <= qcut), file.path(output_dir, "peri_wt_06_sig.csv"))
write_csv(res_06 %>% filter(qval <= qcut & b > 0), file.path(output_dir, "peri_wt_06_up.csv"))
write_csv(res_06 %>% filter(qval <= qcut & b < 0), file.path(output_dir, "peri_wt_06_down.csv"))

# 24h results
res_24 <- sleuth_results(so.peri_24, "conditionExposed_24", "wt", show_all = TRUE)
write_csv(res_24,             file.path(output_dir, "peri_wt_24_all.csv"))
write_csv(res_24 %>% filter(qval <= qcut), file.path(output_dir, "peri_wt_24_sig.csv"))
write_csv(res_24 %>% filter(qval <= qcut & b > 0), file.path(output_dir, "peri_wt_24_up.csv"))
write_csv(res_24 %>% filter(qval <= qcut & b < 0), file.path(output_dir, "peri_wt_24_down.csv"))

# 72h results
res_72 <- sleuth_results(so.peri_72, "conditionExposed_72", "wt", show_all = TRUE)
write_csv(res_72,             file.path(output_dir, "peri_wt_72_all.csv"))
write_csv(res_72 %>% filter(qval <= qcut), file.path(output_dir, "peri_wt_72_sig.csv"))
write_csv(res_72 %>% filter(qval <= qcut & b > 0), file.path(output_dir, "peri_wt_72_up.csv"))
write_csv(res_72 %>% filter(qval <= qcut & b < 0), file.path(output_dir, "peri_wt_72_down.csv"))
```

# 5. Visualization


```{r interactive-sleuth-object}
sleuth_live(so.peri)
```


```{r volcano-plots}
# Plotting function
qcut <- 0.05
fccut <- 1

make_volcano_plot <- function(results_df, timepoint_label, q_threshold = qcut, save_dir) {
  
  plot_data <- results_df %>% 
    mutate(
      neglog10q = -log10(qval + 1e-10),
      is_significant = qval <= q_threshold
    )
  
  p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = b, y = neglog10q)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = is_significant), alpha = 0.6) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("grey70", "darkred")) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = paste0("Peribacillus Volcano Plot - ", timepoint_label, "h"),
      subtitle = "Exposed vs Control",
      x = "b-value (adj Log2FC)",
      y = "-Log10 q-value"
    ) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 11)
    ) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=c(-fccut, fccut),col="lightblue" )
  
  output_file <- file.path(save_dir, paste0("peri_", timepoint_label, "_volcano.png"))
  ggsave(output_file, p, width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 300)
}

# Generate figures
for (time in c("06", "24", "72")) {
  # Read the CSV back into memory to keep this chunk completely independent
  res_data <- read_csv(file.path(output_dir, paste0("peri_wt_", time, "_all.csv")), show_col_types = FALSE)
  
  make_volcano_plot(
    results_df      = res_data,
    timepoint_label = time,
    q_threshold     = qcut,
    save_dir        = output_dir
  )
}
```


```{r plot-bootstraps}
target_gene <- "Gene_ID"
s_measure <- "tpm" # "tpm" or "est_counts"

plot_bootstrap(
  so.peri,
  target_gene,
  units = s_measure,
  color_by = "condition"
)
```
